outages.boundary: Lamar Rd to Ocotillo Rd and 55th Ave to 54th Ave
outages.comments: We are working to restore the power outage caused by temporary problems with our equipment.

outages.boundary: Cloud Nine Pl. to Dog Haven Pl. and Garland Pr. Rd.
outages.comments: Multiple customers have reported an outage in this area. We are investigating and will provide an update once we know more.  Thank you for your patience.
